violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (blender lids) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the (ice machine ) have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2024

Wood is used in the construction of (shelves ) in the ( front counter bar seating) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
(Prep Unit ) located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 67DF. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

The ice machine is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The floor and wall junctures in the (kitchen) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
